title: Trump Says US Could Be Leaving Iran 'Very Soon' | 10 News
description: Donald Trump says the US could wind down its military campaign against Iran within two to three weeks.  Speaking at the White House, he suggested a deal with Tehran is possible, but made clear it isn’t required for a US exit.  He says the operation will end once Iran is left unable to quickly develop a nuclear weapon.  In a stark message to allies, Trump says securing the Strait of Hormuz is up to “whoever is using the strait,” effectively leaving allies to fend for themselves.
